title: Occasion Rotating Lazy Susan Dip Set with 6 Ceramic Dishes in Colour Box
features: SEAMLESS ROTATION: Our Lazy Susan design ensures effortless access to your delectable dips and snacks. Bid farewell to awkward reaches across the table – let the platter revolve gracefully to your guests' delight

CERAMIC ELEGANCE: Included in the set are premium ceramic dishes, thoughtfully sized for your favorite dips, sauces, condiments, and snacks. These microwave and dishwasher-safe dishes add a touch of class to your serving presentation.

EFFORTLESS ENTERTAINMENT: Whether it's a dinner party, game night, or family gathering, our revolving snack bowl adds an element of excitement to your spread. It's also a showstopper for your holiday hosting needs.

VERSATILE CERAMIC DISHES: This set includes premium ceramic dishes, perfectly sized for your favorite dips, sauces, condiments, and snacks. They are microwave and dishwasher safe for your convenience.
PERFECT GIFT: Comes gift boxed,Whether it's for a get together housewarming, or a gift for a foodie lover this is sure to impress.
description: Product Description Ideal For Gifting This set comes packaged in a beautiful gift box, making it the perfect present for friends and family. High Quality Ceramic Dish Set Made with durable and heat-resistant materials for reliable and safe use. Delight Your Guests Use this serving tray to treat you and your guests to a gorgeous range of cheeses, a selection of dips and nibbles. Ideal for sweet treats too Simply swap antipasti for your favourite sweet treats. Makes a great desert centre piece or perfect for movie night! SEE OUR OTHER ITEMS BELOW..
